title: Senior Software Engineer - BSNL - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BSNL - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the BSNL family as a Senior Software Engineer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BSNL:
BSNL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL!
